schemas.name: Virtual Auditor
schemas.description: AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm offering IBBI-compliant valuations (ESOP, FEMA, Income Tax, Companies Act, SEBI, IBC, 409A, complex instruments, AIF), FEMA compliance, GST and income tax appeals, forensic accounting, company registration, and secretarial services across India.

address.streetAddress: G-131, Ground Floor, Phase 3, Spencer Plaza Mall, Anna Salai
Workafella, AK Estate, SV Road, off Veer Savarkar Flyover, Goregaon West

schemas.name: Pricing — All Services | Virtual Auditor
schemas.description: Transparent pricing for valuation, company registration, FEMA compliance, GST/IT appeals, forensic accounting. Indicative fees. No hidden charges. Free consultation.

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. We offer a complimentary 30-minute initial consultation to understand your requirements and provide a detailed quote. Contact us at +91 99622 60333 or support@virtualauditor.in.

No. Our quotes include professional fees and government filing fees (where applicable). Stamp duty, notarization fees, and third-party charges (if any) are mentioned separately in the engagement letter.

mainEntity.name: Do you offer fixed-fee or hourly billing?

acceptedAnswer.text: We primarily work on fixed-fee basis for defined scope engagements (valuations, registrations, specific filings). Ongoing engagements like Virtual CFO, annual compliance, and litigation support are billed on monthly retainer or time-based arrangements, agreed upfront.
Fixed-fee quotes after free consultation. No hourly billing surprises. Fee depends on complexity, regulatory frameworks involved, and timeline. Transparent pricing with no hidden charges.

mainEntity.name: Do you offer EMI for services?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. EMI available for engagement fees above ₹25,000. Split into 2-3 instalments aligned with deliverable milestones. No interest charged on EMI.

mainEntity.name: Is the consultation fee adjusted against engagement?

acceptedAnswer.text: Initial 30-minute consultation is free. If you proceed with engagement, no adjustment needed — consultation is complimentary regardless.

mainEntity.name: Can pricing vary from the quote?

acceptedAnswer.text: Fixed-fee quotes are binding. Pricing changes only if scope changes (e.g., additional regulatory frameworks, additional entities, or expedited delivery). Any scope change communicated and agreed in writing before proceeding.

No. Revisions based on our errors: unlimited at no charge. Revisions due to new information or changed assumptions: one round included. Additional rounds at nominal charge. Our goal is a report you can defend.
